name: Bright Data MCP Server
what_it_does: All-in-one MCP server providing AI agents with live web access capabilities including real-time search, webpage scraping to markdown, browser automation, and structured data extraction from 60+ specialized tools covering e-commerce, social media, finance, travel, and more - all backed by Bright Data's enterprise unblocking infrastructure.
use_cases: Real-time web search from AI agents with anti-bot protection
Converting webpages to clean markdown for LLM consumption
E-commerce price monitoring and product data extraction (Amazon, eBay, Walmart)
Social media data collection (Twitter, LinkedIn, Instagram, TikTok)
Financial data extraction and market research
Location intelligence via Google Maps and business data
Competitive analysis across multiple data sources
not_for: Users who need completely free unlimited scraping
Simple static page fetches where curl suffices
Privacy-sensitive scraping where you control the proxy infrastructure yourself
best_when: You need reliable, unblocked web access for AI agents across diverse data sources, and want 60+ pre-built extraction tools with enterprise-grade anti-bot infrastructure without building scrapers yourself.
avoid_when: You only need basic URL fetching, want zero external service dependencies, need to control your own proxy infrastructure, or are cost-sensitive about per-request pricing for high-volume scraping.

auth.notes: Requires Bright Data API token via API_TOKEN environment variable. Token passed as query parameter for hosted server URL. Free tier available without credit card for Rapid Mode.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Rapid Mode: 5,000 requests/month free. Includes search_engine and scrape_as_markdown tools only.
pricing.paid_tiers: Pro Mode: pay-as-you-go for 60+ tools including browser automation and structured data extraction. Custom Mode: select specific tool groups.
pricing.notes: MIT-licensed MCP server is free. Costs come from Bright Data platform usage. Free Rapid Mode is generous for basic web search and scraping. Pro Mode pricing is usage-based and varies by tool type.

performance.rate_limits: Configurable via RATE_LIMIT env var (e.g., '100/1h'). Default polling timeout of 600s for data collection tools.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Troubleshooting guides provided. Configurable rate limits suggest some error handling awareness, but no detailed documentation on structured error responses or agent-specific error patterns.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Search and scrape operations are inherently repeatable. Browser automation and data extraction jobs may not be idempotent depending on the target site state.
known_agent_gotchas: Free Rapid Mode only includes 2 tools - most useful tools require paid Pro Mode
60+ tools in Pro Mode can overwhelm agent tool selection - use GROUPS/TOOLS env vars to limit scope
Default 600s polling timeout means some data collection calls can be very slow
API token passed as URL query parameter in hosted mode is a security concern
Agents can accumulate significant costs quickly with Pro Mode pay-as-you-go pricing
Anti-bot bypass capabilities raise ethical considerations for some use cases
Requires Bright Data account signup before first use
